jobs.description: Compile and display task list from Trello + Calendar
jobs.prompt: Source .env. Fetch all cards from Trello 'A Fazer' list (use TRELLO_KEY and TRELLO_TOKEN from env, list ID from config/trello.json). Check today's calendar events. Compile a clean task list with: 1) Today's agenda (with times), 2) Dev tasks (prioritized), 3) Other tasks, 4) Brevemente items. Save to memory/today-tasks.md. Print the summary.
Good morning briefing: 1) Check today's calendar events, 2) List Trello 'A Fazer' cards, 3) Check for any pending reminders in memory/reminders.md, 4) Summarize what's on for today. Be concise.
